maxClasses integer | null

The maximum number of classes allowed in a file.

format=uint16min=1max=65535
NoExcessiveCognitiveComplexityConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveCognitiveComplexityOptions
NoExcessiveCognitiveComplexityOptions object
maxAllowedComplexity integer | null

The maximum complexity score that we allow. Anything higher is considered excessive.

format=uint8min=1max=255
NoExcessiveLinesPerFileConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveLinesPerFileOptions
NoExcessiveLinesPerFileOptions object
maxLines integer | null

The maximum number of lines allowed in a file.

format=uint16min=1max=65535
skipBlankLines boolean | null

When this option is set to true, blank lines are not counted towards the maximum line limit.

NoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionOptions
NoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionOptions object
maxLines integer | null

The maximum number of lines allowed in a function body.

format=uint16min=1max=65535
skipBlankLines boolean | null

When this options is set to true, blank lines in the function body are not counted towards the maximum line limit.

skipIifes boolean | null

When this option is set to true, Immediately Invoked Function Expressions (IIFEs) are not checked for the maximum line limit.

NoExcessiveNestedTestSuitesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveNestedTestSuitesOptions
NoExcessiveNestedTestSuitesOptions object

NoExplicitAnyOptions object

NoImportCyclesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImportCyclesOptions
NoImportCyclesOptions object
ignoreTypes boolean | null

Ignores type-only imports when finding an import cycle. A type-only import (import type) will be removed by the compiler, so it cuts an import cycle at runtime. Note that named type imports (import { type Foo }) aren't considered as type-only because it's not removed by the compiler if the verbatimModuleSyntax option is enabled. Enabled by default.

NoImportantInKeyframeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImportantInKeyframeOptions
NoImportantInKeyframeOptions object
NoImportantStylesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImportantStylesOptions
NoImportantStylesOptions object
NoIncrementDecrementConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoIncrementDecrementOptions
NoIncrementDecrementOptions object
allowForLoopAfterthoughts boolean | null

Allows unary operators ++ and -- in the afterthought (final expression) of a for loop.

NoUndeclaredDependenciesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUndeclaredDependenciesOptions
NoUndeclaredDependenciesOptions object
devDependencies DependencyAvailability | null

If set to false, then the rule will show an error when devDependencies are imported. Defaults to true.

Any of: DependencyAvailability boolean | string[], null null
optionalDependencies DependencyAvailability | null

If set to false, then the rule will show an error when optionalDependencies are imported. Defaults to true.

Any of: DependencyAvailability boolean | string[], null null
peerDependencies DependencyAvailability | null

If set to false, then the rule will show an error when peerDependencies are imported. Defaults to true.

Any of: DependencyAvailability boolean | string[], null null
NoUndeclaredEnvVarsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUndeclaredEnvVarsOptions
NoUndeclaredEnvVarsOptions object
allowedEnvVars array | null

Environment variables that should always be allowed. Use this to specify environment variables that are always available in your environment, even when not declared in turbo.json. Supports regular expressions, e.g. ["MY_ENV_.*"].

NoUndeclaredVariablesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUndeclaredVariablesOptions
NoUndeclaredVariablesOptions object
checkTypes boolean | null

Check undeclared types.

NoYodaExpressionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoYodaExpressionOptions
NoYodaExpressionOptions object
NormalizedGlob string

Normalized Biome glob pattern that strips ./ from the pattern.

Nursery object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noAmbiguousAnchorText NoAmbiguousAnchorTextConfiguration | null

Disallow ambiguous anchor descriptions. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-ambiguous-anchor-text

Any of: NoAmbiguousAnchorTextConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAmbiguousAnchorTextOptions, null null
noBeforeInteractiveScriptOutsideDocument NoBeforeInteractiveScriptOutsideDocumentConfiguration | null

Prevent usage of next/script's beforeInteractive strategy outside of pages/_document.js in a Next.js project. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-before-interactive-script-outside-document

Any of: NoBeforeInteractiveScriptOutsideDocumentConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoBeforeInteractiveScriptOutsideDocumentOptions, null null
noConditionalExpect NoConditionalExpectConfiguration | null

Disallow conditional expect() calls inside tests. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-conditional-expect

Any of: NoConditionalExpectConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConditionalExpectOptions, null null
noContinue NoContinueConfiguration | null

Disallow continue statements. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-continue

Any of: NoContinueConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoContinueOptions, null null
noDeprecatedMediaType NoDeprecatedMediaTypeConfiguration | null

Disallow deprecated media types. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-deprecated-media-type

Any of: NoDeprecatedMediaTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDeprecatedMediaTypeOptions, null null
noDivRegex NoDivRegexConfiguration | null

Disallow equal signs explicitly at the beginning of regular expressions. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-div-regex

Any of: NoDivRegexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDivRegexOptions, null null
noDuplicateArgumentNames NoDuplicateArgumentNamesConfiguration | null

Require all argument names for fields & directives to be unique. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-duplicate-argument-names

Any of: NoDuplicateArgumentNamesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateArgumentNamesOptions, null null
noDuplicateAttributes NoDuplicateAttributesConfiguration | null

Disallow duplication of attributes. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-duplicate-attributes

Any of: NoDuplicateAttributesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateAttributesOptions, null null
noDuplicateEnumValueNames NoDuplicateEnumValueNamesConfiguration | null

Require all enum value names to be unique. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-duplicate-enum-value-names

Any of: NoDuplicateEnumValueNamesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateEnumValueNamesOptions, null null
noDuplicateEnumValues NoDuplicateEnumValuesConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate enum member values. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-duplicate-enum-values

Any of: NoDuplicateEnumValuesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateEnumValuesOptions, null null
noDuplicateFieldDefinitionNames NoDuplicateFieldDefinitionNamesConfiguration | null

Require all fields of a type to be unique. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-duplicate-field-definition-names

Any of: NoDuplicateFieldDefinitionNamesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateFieldDefinitionNamesOptions, null null
noDuplicateGraphqlOperationName NoDuplicateGraphqlOperationNameConfiguration | null

Enforce unique operation names across a GraphQL document. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-duplicate-graphql-operation-name

Any of: NoDuplicateGraphqlOperationNameConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateGraphqlOperationNameOptions, null null
noDuplicateInputFieldNames NoDuplicateInputFieldNamesConfiguration | null

Require fields within an input object to be unique. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-duplicate-input-field-names

Any of: NoDuplicateInputFieldNamesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateInputFieldNamesOptions, null null
noDuplicateVariableNames NoDuplicateVariableNamesConfiguration | null

Require all variable definitions to be unique. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-duplicate-variable-names

Any of: NoDuplicateVariableNamesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateVariableNamesOptions, null null
noDuplicatedSpreadProps NoDuplicatedSpreadPropsConfiguration | null

Disallow JSX prop spreading the same identifier multiple times. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-duplicated-spread-props

Any of: NoDuplicatedSpreadPropsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicatedSpreadPropsOptions, null null
noEqualsToNull NoEqualsToNullConfiguration | null

Require the use of === or !== for comparison with null. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-equals-to-null

Any of: NoEqualsToNullConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoEqualsToNullOptions, null null
noExcessiveClassesPerFile NoExcessiveClassesPerFileConfiguration | null

Enforce a maximum number of classes per file. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-excessive-classes-per-file

Any of: NoExcessiveClassesPerFileConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveClassesPerFileOptions, null null
noExcessiveLinesPerFile NoExcessiveLinesPerFileConfiguration | null

Restrict the number of lines in a file. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-excessive-lines-per-file

Any of: NoExcessiveLinesPerFileConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveLinesPerFileOptions, null null
noFloatingClasses NoFloatingClassesConfiguration | null

Disallow new operators outside of assignments or comparisons. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-floating-classes

Any of: NoFloatingClassesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoFloatingClassesOptions, null null
noFloatingPromises NoFloatingPromisesConfiguration | null

Require Promise-like statements to be handled appropriately. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-floating-promises

Any of: NoFloatingPromisesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoFloatingPromisesOptions, null null
noForIn NoForInConfiguration | null

Disallow iterating using a for-in loop. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-for-in

Any of: NoForInConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoForInOptions, null null
noHexColors NoHexColorsConfiguration | null

Disallow hex colors. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-hex-colors

Any of: NoHexColorsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoHexColorsOptions, null null
noIncrementDecrement NoIncrementDecrementConfiguration | null

Disallows the usage of the unary operators ++ and --. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-increment-decrement

Any of: NoIncrementDecrementConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoIncrementDecrementOptions, null null
noJsxPropsBind NoJsxPropsBindConfiguration | null

Disallow .bind(), arrow functions, or function expressions in JSX props. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-jsx-props-bind

Any of: NoJsxPropsBindConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoJsxPropsBindOptions, null null
noLeakedRender NoLeakedRenderConfiguration | null

Prevent problematic leaked values from being rendered. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-leaked-render

Any of: NoLeakedRenderConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoLeakedRenderOptions, null null
noMisusedPromises NoMisusedPromisesConfiguration | null

Disallow Promises to be used in places where they are almost certainly a mistake. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-misused-promises

Any of: NoMisusedPromisesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMisusedPromisesOptions, null null
noMultiAssign NoMultiAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow use of chained assignment expressions. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-multi-assign

Any of: NoMultiAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMultiAssignOptions, null null
noMultiStr NoMultiStrConfiguration | null

Disallow creating multiline strings by escaping newlines. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-multi-str

Any of: NoMultiStrConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMultiStrOptions, null null
noNestedPromises NoNestedPromisesConfiguration | null

Disallow nested .then() or .catch() promise calls. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-nested-promises

Any of: NoNestedPromisesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNestedPromisesOptions, null null
noParametersOnlyUsedInRecursion NoParametersOnlyUsedInRecursionConfiguration | null

Disallow function parameters that are only used in recursive calls. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-parameters-only-used-in-recursion

Any of: NoParametersOnlyUsedInRecursionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoParametersOnlyUsedInRecursionOptions, null null
noPlaywrightElementHandle NoPlaywrightElementHandleConfiguration | null

Disallow usage of element handles (page.$() and page.$$()). See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-element-handle

Any of: NoPlaywrightElementHandleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightElementHandleOptions, null null
noPlaywrightEval NoPlaywrightEvalConfiguration | null

Disallow usage of page.$eval() and page.$$eval(). See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-eval

Any of: NoPlaywrightEvalConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightEvalOptions, null null
noPlaywrightForceOption NoPlaywrightForceOptionConfiguration | null

Disallow usage of the { force: true } option. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-force-option

Any of: NoPlaywrightForceOptionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightForceOptionOptions, null null
noPlaywrightMissingAwait NoPlaywrightMissingAwaitConfiguration | null

Enforce Playwright async APIs to be awaited or returned. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-missing-await

Any of: NoPlaywrightMissingAwaitConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightMissingAwaitOptions, null null
noPlaywrightNetworkidle NoPlaywrightNetworkidleConfiguration | null

Disallow usage of the networkidle option. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-networkidle

Any of: NoPlaywrightNetworkidleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightNetworkidleOptions, null null
noPlaywrightPagePause NoPlaywrightPagePauseConfiguration | null

Disallow using page.pause(). See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-page-pause

Any of: NoPlaywrightPagePauseConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightPagePauseOptions, null null
noPlaywrightUselessAwait NoPlaywrightUselessAwaitConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary await for Playwright methods that don't return promises. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-useless-await

Any of: NoPlaywrightUselessAwaitConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightUselessAwaitOptions, null null
noPlaywrightWaitForNavigation NoPlaywrightWaitForNavigationConfiguration | null

Disallow using page.waitForNavigation(). See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-wait-for-navigation

Any of: NoPlaywrightWaitForNavigationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightWaitForNavigationOptions, null null
noPlaywrightWaitForSelector NoPlaywrightWaitForSelectorConfiguration | null

Disallow using page.waitForSelector(). See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-wait-for-selector

Any of: NoPlaywrightWaitForSelectorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightWaitForSelectorOptions, null null
noPlaywrightWaitForTimeout NoPlaywrightWaitForTimeoutConfiguration | null

Disallow using page.waitForTimeout(). See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-playwright-wait-for-timeout

Any of: NoPlaywrightWaitForTimeoutConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPlaywrightWaitForTimeoutOptions, null null
noProto NoProtoConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of the deprecated proto object property. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-proto

Any of: NoProtoConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoProtoOptions, null null
noRedundantDefaultExport NoRedundantDefaultExportConfiguration | null

Checks if a default export exports the same symbol as a named export. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-redundant-default-export

Any of: NoRedundantDefaultExportConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRedundantDefaultExportOptions, null null
noReturnAssign NoReturnAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow assignments in return statements. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-return-assign

Any of: NoReturnAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoReturnAssignOptions, null null
noRootType NoRootTypeConfiguration | null

Disallow the usage of specified root types. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-root-type

Any of: NoRootTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRootTypeOptions, null null
noScriptUrl NoScriptUrlConfiguration | null

Disallow javascript: URLs in HTML. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-script-url

Any of: NoScriptUrlConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoScriptUrlOptions, null null
noShadow NoShadowConfiguration | null

Disallow variable declarations from shadowing variables declared in the outer scope. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-shadow

Any of: NoShadowConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoShadowOptions, null null
noSyncScripts NoSyncScriptsConfiguration | null

Prevent the usage of synchronous scripts. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-sync-scripts

Any of: NoSyncScriptsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSyncScriptsOptions, null null
noTernary NoTernaryConfiguration | null

Disallow ternary operators. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-ternary

Any of: NoTernaryConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoTernaryOptions, null null
noUndeclaredEnvVars NoUndeclaredEnvVarsConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of undeclared environment variables. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-undeclared-env-vars

Any of: NoUndeclaredEnvVarsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUndeclaredEnvVarsOptions, null null
noUnknownAttribute NoUnknownAttributeConfiguration | null

Disallow unknown DOM properties. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-unknown-attribute

Any of: NoUnknownAttributeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnknownAttributeOptions, null null
noUnnecessaryConditions NoUnnecessaryConditionsConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary type-based conditions that can be statically determined as redundant. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-unnecessary-conditions

Any of: NoUnnecessaryConditionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnnecessaryConditionsOptions, null null
noUselessReturn NoUselessReturnConfiguration | null

Disallow redundant return statements. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-useless-return

Any of: NoUselessReturnConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessReturnOptions, null null
noVueArrowFuncInWatch NoVueArrowFuncInWatchConfiguration | null

Disallows using arrow functions when defining a watcher. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-vue-arrow-func-in-watch

Any of: NoVueArrowFuncInWatchConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVueArrowFuncInWatchOptions, null null
noVueOptionsApi NoVueOptionsApiConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of Vue Options API. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-vue-options-api

Any of: NoVueOptionsApiConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVueOptionsApiOptions, null null
noVueVIfWithVFor NoVueVIfWithVForConfiguration | null

Disallow using v-if and v-for directives on the same element. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-vue-v-if-with-v-for

Any of: NoVueVIfWithVForConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVueVIfWithVForOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

Enables the recommended rules for this group

useArraySortCompare UseArraySortCompareConfiguration | null

Require Array#sort and Array#toSorted calls to always provide a compareFunction. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-array-sort-compare

Any of: UseArraySortCompareConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseArraySortCompareOptions, null null
useAwaitThenable UseAwaitThenableConfiguration | null

Enforce that await is only used on Promise values. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-await-thenable

Any of: UseAwaitThenableConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAwaitThenableOptions, null null
useConsistentEnumValueType UseConsistentEnumValueTypeConfiguration | null

Disallow enums from having both number and string members. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-consistent-enum-value-type

Any of: UseConsistentEnumValueTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentEnumValueTypeOptions, null null
useConsistentGraphqlDescriptions UseConsistentGraphqlDescriptionsConfiguration | null

Require all descriptions to follow the same style (either block or inline) to maintain consistency and improve readability across the schema. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-consistent-graphql-descriptions

Any of: UseConsistentGraphqlDescriptionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentGraphqlDescriptionsOptions, null null
useConsistentMethodSignatures UseConsistentMethodSignaturesConfiguration | null

Enforce consistent use of either method signatures or function properties within interfaces and type aliases. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-consistent-method-signatures

Any of: UseConsistentMethodSignaturesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentMethodSignaturesOptions, null null
useDestructuring UseDestructuringConfiguration | null

Require destructuring from arrays and/or objects. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-destructuring

Any of: UseDestructuringConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseDestructuringOptions, null null
useErrorCause UseErrorCauseConfiguration | null

Enforce that new Error() is thrown with the original error as cause. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-error-cause

Any of: UseErrorCauseConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseErrorCauseOptions, null null
useExhaustiveSwitchCases UseExhaustiveSwitchCasesConfiguration | null

Require switch-case statements to be exhaustive. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-exhaustive-switch-cases

Any of: UseExhaustiveSwitchCasesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExhaustiveSwitchCasesOptions, null null
useExpect UseExpectConfiguration | null

Ensure that test functions contain at least one expect() assertion. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-expect

Any of: UseExpectConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExpectOptions, null null
useExplicitType UseExplicitTypeConfiguration | null

Enforce types in functions, methods, variables, and parameters. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-explicit-type

Any of: UseExplicitTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExplicitTypeOptions, null null
useFind UseFindConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of Array.prototype.find() over Array.prototype.filter() followed by [0] when looking for a single result. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-find

Any of: UseFindConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseFindOptions, null null
useGlobalThis UseGlobalThisConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of globalThis over window, self, and global. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-global-this

Any of: UseGlobalThisConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGlobalThisOptions, null null
useInlineScriptId UseInlineScriptIdConfiguration | null

Enforce id attribute on next/script components with inline content or dangerouslySetInnerHTML. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-inline-script-id

Any of: UseInlineScriptIdConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseInlineScriptIdOptions, null null
useInputName UseInputNameConfiguration | null

Require mutation argument to be always called "input". See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-input-name

Any of: UseInputNameConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseInputNameOptions, null null
useLoneAnonymousOperation UseLoneAnonymousOperationConfiguration | null

Disallow anonymous operations when more than one operation specified in document. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-lone-anonymous-operation

Any of: UseLoneAnonymousOperationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseLoneAnonymousOperationOptions, null null
useLoneExecutableDefinition UseLoneExecutableDefinitionConfiguration | null

Require queries, mutations, subscriptions or fragments each to be located in separate files. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-lone-executable-definition

Any of: UseLoneExecutableDefinitionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseLoneExecutableDefinitionOptions, null null
usePlaywrightValidDescribeCallback UsePlaywrightValidDescribeCallbackConfiguration | null

Enforce valid describe() callback. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-playwright-valid-describe-callback

Any of: UsePlaywrightValidDescribeCallbackConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUsePlaywrightValidDescribeCallbackOptions, null null
useRegexpExec UseRegexpExecConfiguration | null

Enforce RegExp#exec over String#match if no global flag is provided. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-regexp-exec

Any of: UseRegexpExecConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseRegexpExecOptions, null null
useRequiredScripts UseRequiredScriptsConfiguration | null

Enforce the presence of required scripts in package.json. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-required-scripts

Any of: UseRequiredScriptsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseRequiredScriptsOptions, null null
useSortedClasses UseSortedClassesConfiguration | null

Enforce the sorting of CSS utility classes. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-sorted-classes

Any of: UseSortedClassesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSortedClassesOptions, null null
useSpread UseSpreadConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of the spread operator over .apply(). See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-spread

Any of: UseSpreadConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSpreadOptions, null null
useVueConsistentDefinePropsDeclaration UseVueConsistentDefinePropsDeclarationConfiguration | null

Enforce consistent defineProps declaration style. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-consistent-define-props-declaration

Any of: UseVueConsistentDefinePropsDeclarationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueConsistentDefinePropsDeclarationOptions, null null
useVueConsistentVBindStyle UseVueConsistentVBindStyleConfiguration | null

Enforce a consistent style for v-bind in Vue templates. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-consistent-v-bind-style

Any of: UseVueConsistentVBindStyleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueConsistentVBindStyleOptions, null null
useVueConsistentVOnStyle UseVueConsistentVOnStyleConfiguration | null

Enforce a consistent style for v-on in Vue templates. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-consistent-v-on-style

Any of: UseVueConsistentVOnStyleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueConsistentVOnStyleOptions, null null
useVueDefineMacrosOrder UseVueDefineMacrosOrderConfiguration | null

Enforce specific order of Vue compiler macros. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-define-macros-order

Any of: UseVueDefineMacrosOrderConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueDefineMacrosOrderOptions, null null
useVueHyphenatedAttributes UseVueHyphenatedAttributesConfiguration | null

Enforce hyphenated (kebab-case) attribute names in Vue templates. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-hyphenated-attributes

Any of: UseVueHyphenatedAttributesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueHyphenatedAttributesOptions, null null
useVueMultiWordComponentNames UseVueMultiWordComponentNamesConfiguration | null

Enforce multi-word component names in Vue components. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-multi-word-component-names

Any of: UseVueMultiWordComponentNamesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueMultiWordComponentNamesOptions, null null
useVueVForKey UseVueVForKeyConfiguration | null

Enforce that elements using v-for also specify a unique key. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-v-for-key

Any of: UseVueVForKeyConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueVForKeyOptions, null null
useVueValidTemplateRoot UseVueValidTemplateRootConfiguration | null

Enforce valid Vue <template> root usage. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-template-root

Any of: UseVueValidTemplateRootConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidTemplateRootOptions, null null
useVueValidVBind UseVueValidVBindConfiguration | null

Forbids v-bind directives with missing arguments or invalid modifiers. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-bind

Any of: UseVueValidVBindConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVBindOptions, null null
useVueValidVCloak UseVueValidVCloakConfiguration | null

Enforce valid v-cloak Vue directives. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-cloak

Any of: UseVueValidVCloakConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVCloakOptions, null null
useVueValidVElse UseVueValidVElseConfiguration | null

Enforce valid usage of v-else. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-else

Any of: UseVueValidVElseConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVElseOptions, null null
useVueValidVElseIf UseVueValidVElseIfConfiguration | null

Enforce valid v-else-if directives. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-else-if

Any of: UseVueValidVElseIfConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVElseIfOptions, null null
useVueValidVHtml UseVueValidVHtmlConfiguration | null

Enforce valid v-html directives. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-html

Any of: UseVueValidVHtmlConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVHtmlOptions, null null
useVueValidVIf UseVueValidVIfConfiguration | null

Enforces valid v-if usage for Vue templates. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-if

Any of: UseVueValidVIfConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVIfOptions, null null
useVueValidVOn UseVueValidVOnConfiguration | null

Enforce valid v-on directives with proper arguments, modifiers, and handlers. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-on

Any of: UseVueValidVOnConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVOnOptions, null null
useVueValidVOnce UseVueValidVOnceConfiguration | null

Enforce valid v-once Vue directives. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-once

Any of: UseVueValidVOnceConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVOnceOptions, null null
useVueValidVPre UseVueValidVPreConfiguration | null

Enforce valid v-pre Vue directives. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-pre

Any of: UseVueValidVPreConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVPreOptions, null null
useVueValidVText UseVueValidVTextConfiguration | null

Enforce valid v-text Vue directives. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-valid-v-text

Any of: UseVueValidVTextConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueValidVTextOptions, null null
useVueVapor UseVueVaporConfiguration | null

Enforce opting in to Vue Vapor mode in <script setup> blocks. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-vue-vapor

Any of: UseVueVaporConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseVueVaporOptions, null null
ObjectPropertySyntax string | string
OperatorLinebreak string | string
OrganizeImportsConfiguration RuleAssistPlainConfiguration | RuleAssistWithOrganizeImportsOptions
OrganizeImportsOptions object
groups ImportGroups | null
Any of: ImportGroups ImportGroup[], null null
identifierOrder SortOrder | null
Any of: SortOrder string, null null
OverrideAssistConfiguration object
actions Actions | null

List of actions

Any of: Actions object, null null
enabled Bool | null

if false, it disables the feature and the assist won't be executed. true by default

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
OverrideFilesConfiguration object
maxSize MaxSize | null

File size limit in bytes

Any of: MaxSize integer, null null
OverrideFormatterConfiguration object
attributePosition AttributePosition | null

The attribute position style.

Any of: AttributePosition string, null null
bracketSameLine BracketSameLine | null

Put the > of a multi-line HTML or JSX element at the end of the last line instead of being alone on the next line (does not apply to self closing elements).

Any of: BracketSameLine boolean, null null
bracketSpacing BracketSpacing | null

Whether to insert spaces around brackets in object literals. Defaults to true.

Any of: BracketSpacing boolean, null null
enabled Bool | null
Any of: Bool boolean, null null
expand Expand | null

Whether to expand arrays and objects on multiple lines. When set to auto, object literals are formatted on multiple lines if the first property has a newline, and array literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When set to always, these literals are formatted on multiple lines, regardless of length of the list. When set to never, these literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When formatting package.json, Biome will use always unless configured otherwise. Defaults to "auto".

Any of: Expand string | string | string, null null
formatWithErrors Bool | null

Stores whether formatting should be allowed to proceed if a given file has syntax errors

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
indentSize IndentWidth | null

The size of the indentation, 2 by default (deprecated, use indent-width)

Any of: IndentWidth integer, null null
indentStyle IndentStyle | null

The indent style.

Any of: IndentStyle string | string, null null
indentWidth IndentWidth | null

The size of the indentation, 2 by default

Any of: IndentWidth integer, null null
lineEnding LineEnding | null

The type of line ending.

Any of: LineEnding string | string | string | string, null null
lineWidth LineWidth | null

What's the max width of a line. Defaults to 80.

Any of: LineWidth integer, null null
trailingNewline TrailingNewline | null

Whether to add a trailing newline at the end of the file.

Setting this option to false is highly discouraged because it could cause many problems with other tools:

  • https://thoughtbot.com/blog/no-newline-at-end-of-file
  • https://callmeryan.medium.com/no-newline-at-end-of-file-navigating-gits-warning-for-android-developers-af14e73dd804
  • https://unix.stackexchange.com/questions/345548/how-to-cat-files-together-adding-missing-newlines-at-end-of-some-files

Disable the option at your own risk.

Defaults to true.

Any of: TrailingNewline boolean, null null
OverrideGlobs Glob[]
OverrideLinterConfiguration object
domains RuleDomains | null

List of rules

Any of: RuleDomains object, null null
enabled Bool | null

if false, it disables the feature and the linter won't be executed. true by default

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
rules Rules | null

List of rules

Any of: Rules object, null null
OverridePattern object
assist OverrideAssistConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Json language

Any of: OverrideAssistConfiguration object, null null
css CssConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the CSS language

Any of: CssConfiguration object, null null
files OverrideFilesConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the filesystem

Any of: OverrideFilesConfiguration object, null null
formatter OverrideFormatterConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Json language

Any of: OverrideFormatterConfiguration object, null null
graphql GraphqlConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Graphql language

Any of: GraphqlConfiguration object, null null
grit GritConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the GritQL language

Any of: GritConfiguration object, null null
html HtmlConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the GritQL language

Any of: HtmlConfiguration object, null null
includes OverrideGlobs | null

A list of glob patterns. Biome will include files/folders that will match these patterns.

Any of: OverrideGlobs Glob[], null null
javascript JsConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the JavaScript language

Any of: JsConfiguration object, null null
json JsonConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Json language

Any of: JsonConfiguration object, null null
linter OverrideLinterConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Json language

Any of: OverrideLinterConfiguration object, null null
plugins Plugins | null

Specific configuration for additional plugins

Any of: Plugins PluginConfiguration[], null null
Overrides OverridePattern[]
PathOptions object
allowImportNames string[]

Names of the exported members that allowed to be not be used.

importNames string[]

Names of the exported members that should not be used.

message string

The message to display when this module is imported.

Paths string | PathOptions
PatternOptions object
group SourcesMatcher | null

An array of gitignore-style patterns.

Any of: SourcesMatcher SourceMatcher | SourceMatcher[], null null
importNamePattern Regex | null

A regex pattern for import names to forbid within the matched modules.

Any of: Regex string, null null
invertImportNamePattern boolean

If true, the matched patterns in the importNamePattern will be allowed. Defaults to false.

Default: false
message string | null

A custom message for diagnostics related to this pattern.

Patterns PatternOptions
Performance object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noAccumulatingSpread NoAccumulatingSpreadConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of spread (...) syntax on accumulators. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-accumulating-spread

Any of: NoAccumulatingSpreadConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAccumulatingSpreadOptions, null null
noAwaitInLoops NoAwaitInLoopsConfiguration | null

Disallow await inside loops. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-await-in-loops

Any of: NoAwaitInLoopsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAwaitInLoopsOptions, null null
noBarrelFile NoBarrelFileConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of barrel file. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-barrel-file

Any of: NoBarrelFileConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoBarrelFileOptions, null null
noDelete NoDeleteConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of the delete operator. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-delete

Any of: NoDeleteConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDeleteOptions, null null
noDynamicNamespaceImportAccess NoDynamicNamespaceImportAccessConfiguration | null

Disallow accessing namespace imports dynamically. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-dynamic-namespace-import-access

Any of: NoDynamicNamespaceImportAccessConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDynamicNamespaceImportAccessOptions, null null
noImgElement NoImgElementConfiguration | null

Prevent usage of <img> element in a Next.js project. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-img-element

Any of: NoImgElementConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImgElementOptions, null null
noNamespaceImport NoNamespaceImportConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of namespace imports. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-namespace-import

Any of: NoNamespaceImportConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNamespaceImportOptions, null null
noReExportAll NoReExportAllConfiguration | null

Avoid re-export all. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-re-export-all

Any of: NoReExportAllConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoReExportAllOptions, null null
noUnwantedPolyfillio NoUnwantedPolyfillioConfiguration | null

Prevent duplicate polyfills from Polyfill.io. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-unwanted-polyfillio

Any of: NoUnwantedPolyfillioConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnwantedPolyfillioOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

Enables the recommended rules for this group

useGoogleFontPreconnect UseGoogleFontPreconnectConfiguration | null

Ensure the preconnect attribute is used when using Google Fonts. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-google-font-preconnect

Any of: UseGoogleFontPreconnectConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGoogleFontPreconnectOptions, null null
useSolidForComponent UseSolidForComponentConfiguration | null

Enforce using Solid's <For /> component for mapping an array to JSX elements. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-solid-for-component

Any of: UseSolidForComponentConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSolidForComponentOptions, null null
useTopLevelRegex UseTopLevelRegexConfiguration | null

Require regex literals to be declared at the top level. See https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-top-level-regex

Any of: UseTopLevelRegexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseTopLevelRegexOptions, null null
PluginConfiguration string
Plugins PluginConfiguration[]
PropertyAssignmentMode string | string

Specifies whether property assignments on function parameters are allowed or denied.

QuoteProperties string
QuoteStyle string
Regex string
RestrictedModifier string
RuleAssistPlainConfiguration string
RuleAssistWithNoDuplicateClassesOptions object
level string required
Values: "off" "on"
options object required
2 nested properties
attributes array | null

Additional attributes that will be sorted.

functions array | null

Names of the functions or tagged templates that will be sorted.

RuleAssistWithOrganizeImportsOptions object
level string required
Values: "off" "on"
options object required
2 nested properties
groups ImportGroups | null
Any of: ImportGroups ImportGroup[], null null
identifierOrder SortOrder | null
Any of: SortOrder string, null null
RuleAssistWithUseSortedAttributesOptions object
level string required
Values: "off" "on"
options object required
1 nested properties
sortOrder SortOrder | null
Any of: SortOrder string, null null
RuleAssistWithUseSortedInterfaceMembersOptions object
level string required
Values: "off" "on"
options object required
RuleAssistWithUseSortedKeysOptions object
level string required
Values: "off" "on"
options object required
2 nested properties
groupByNesting boolean | null

When enabled, groups object keys by their value's nesting depth before sorting. Simple values (primitives, single-line arrays, single-line objects) are sorted first, followed by nested values (multi-line objects, multi-line arrays).

sortOrder SortOrder | null
Any of: SortOrder string, null null
RuleAssistWithUseSortedPropertiesOptions object
level string required
Values: "off" "on"
options object required

ignoreNull boolean | null

If true, an exception is made when comparing with null, as it's often relied on to check both for null or undefined.

If false, no such exception will be made.

RuleWithNoExcessiveLinesPerFileOptions object
level string | string | string | string | string required
One of: string string, string string, string string, string string, string string
options object
2 nested properties
maxLines integer | null

The maximum number of lines allowed in a file.

format=uint16min=1max=65535
skipBlankLines boolean | null

When this option is set to true, blank lines are not counted towards the maximum line limit.

RuleWithNoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionOptions object
level string | string | string | string | string required
One of: string string, string string, string string, string string, string string
options object
3 nested properties
maxLines integer | null

The maximum number of lines allowed in a function body.

format=uint16min=1max=65535
skipBlankLines boolean | null

When this options is set to true, blank lines in the function body are not counted towards the maximum line limit.

skipIifes boolean | null

When this option is set to true, Immediately Invoked Function Expressions (IIFEs) are not checked for the maximum line limit.

RuleWithNoImportAssignOptions object

options object
RuleWithNoImportCyclesOptions object
level string | string | string | string | string required
One of: string string, string string, string string, string string, string string
options object
1 nested properties
ignoreTypes boolean | null

Ignores type-only imports when finding an import cycle. A type-only import (import type) will be removed by the compiler, so it cuts an import cycle at runtime. Note that named type imports (import { type Foo }) aren't considered as type-only because it's not removed by the compiler if the verbatimModuleSyntax option is enabled. Enabled by default.

RuleWithNoUndeclaredDependenciesOptions object
level string | string | string | string | string required
One of: string string, string string, string string, string string, string string
options object
3 nested properties
devDependencies DependencyAvailability | null

If set to false, then the rule will show an error when devDependencies are imported. Defaults to true.

Any of: DependencyAvailability boolean | string[], null null
optionalDependencies DependencyAvailability | null

If set to false, then the rule will show an error when optionalDependencies are imported. Defaults to true.

Any of: DependencyAvailability boolean | string[], null null
peerDependencies DependencyAvailability | null

If set to false, then the rule will show an error when peerDependencies are imported. Defaults to true.

Any of: DependencyAvailability boolean | string[], null null
RuleWithNoUndeclaredEnvVarsOptions object
level string | string | string | string | string required
One of: string string, string string, string string, string string, string string
options object
1 nested properties
allowedEnvVars array | null

Environment variables that should always be allowed. Use this to specify environment variables that are always available in your environment, even when not declared in turbo.json. Supports regular expressions, e.g. ["MY_ENV_.*"].

2 nested properties
allowConstantExport boolean | null

Allows the export of constants. This option is for environments that support it, such as Vite

Default: null
allowExportNames array | null

A list of names that can be additionally exported from the module This option is for exports that do not hinder React Fast Refresh, such as meta in Remix

Options for the useConsistentArrowReturn rule.

2 nested properties
requireForObjectLiteral boolean | null

Determines whether the rule enforces a consistent style when the return value is an object literal.

This option is only applicable when used in conjunction with the asNeeded option.

style UseConsistentArrowReturnStyle | null

The style to enforce for arrow function return statements.

Any of: UseConsistentArrowReturnStyle string | string | string, null null

hooks array | null

List of hooks of which the dependencies should be validated.

reportMissingDependenciesArray boolean | null

reportUnnecessaryDependencies boolean | null

Whether to report an error when a dependency is listed in the dependencies array but isn't used. Defaults to true.

extensionMappings object | null

A map of file extensions to their suggested replacements. For example, {"ts": "js"} would suggest .js extensions for TypeScript imports.

forceJsExtensions boolean | null

If true, the suggested extension is always .js regardless of what extension the source file has in your project.

format=uint8min=0max=255

strictCase boolean | null

Rules object
a11y SeverityOrA11y | null

complexity SeverityOrComplexity | null

correctness SeverityOrCorrectness | null

nursery SeverityOrNursery | null
